chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail Application No.S-591 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on MA No.3585/2025 2. For orders on MA No.3586/2025 3. For hearing of Bail Application 11.7.2025 Mr. Shahid Ali Memon, Advocate for the Applicant/Accused.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Granted. 2. Granted subject to all just exceptions. 3. Through instant bail application, applicant/accused Saleem Raza son of Muhammad Raza, seeks protective bail in Crime No.11/2025, registered at Police Station FIA, Crime & AHT Circle Sukkur, u/s 22(b) of Emigration Ordinance, 1979, r/w section 406, 419, 420, 109 and 34 PPC. It is, inter-alia, contended that the applicant/accused is innocent and has falsely been implicated by the complainant with malafide intention and ulterior motive; that there is an inordinate delay of about 12 days in lodging of FIR which has not been explained; that the PWs are relatives of the complainant, hence they are interested witnesses; that the applicant/ accused is ready to surrender before the Court concerned but apprehends his arrest and humiliation at the hands of FIA police. Without touching merits of the case, protective bail for a period of seven days is granted to applicant/accused subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (Rupees Fifty Thousand) and P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Additional Registrar of this Court. This order shall cease to have its effect after expiry of above mentioned period or whenever applicant/accused surrenders before the Court concerned, which one occurs earlier. It is, however, made clear that in case the applicant/accused fails to surrender before the Court concerned within stipulated period, his bail bond shall stands automatically forfeited.

This order shall cease to have its effect after expiry of above mentioned period or whenever applicant/accused surrenders before the Court concerned, which one occurs earlier. It is, however, made clear that in case the applicant/accused fails to surrender before the Court concerned within stipulated period, his bail bond shall stands automatically forfeited. Criminal Bail Application stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE Suleman Khan/PA
